prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4082→4687→6968→10308→11635，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约7553名；2025年基准约11635名，近3年每年后移幅度约1500–30 00名，后移速度有所加快；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年37人、2022年41人、2023年34人、2024年45人、2025年46人；2026年计划48人，较20 25年扩招约4.3%，扩招幅度温和，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第35名，连续多年稳定在前35名，属 于顶尖211院校，办学实力和品牌认可度稳固；2026年高考周期声誉文件中未出现该校相关舆情事件，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第99位（一般），短视频 曝光量中等；无投档断档记录，报考心理预期稳定；第五轮学科评估中，工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经类学 科实力位居全国前列，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类专业热度2024年为"分化观望"，较2021年"推荐"（72.42）有所降温，社会舆论对财经类专业呈分化态度；河北省2026年物理类考生估算约365880人，较2025年363040人略增0.78%，竞争小幅加剧；上海财经大学位于上海市，对河北考生属跨省报考；该校在全国范围内招生，河北省物理类招生占比约2–3%，属正常水平，无明显 地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招4.3%、物理类考生总数略增0.78%、财经类专业热度分化但上财品牌力强劲等因素，考虑考生规模微增及扩招带来的关注度上升，小幅上调50名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约11989名，区间11489–12489名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11489–12489名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（财政学类、财务管理、统计学类、经济学），一档专业（金融学、会计学）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（计算机 、信管、数学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<11489名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4082 → 4687 → 6968 → 10308 → 11635, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7553 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11635, with an annual backward shift of about 1500–3000 places in the past 3 years, and the speed of backward shift has accelerated; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 37 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48, an expansion of about 4.3% compared to 2025, which is moderate and helps alleviate competitive pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, stable among the top 35 for many consecutive years, belonging to top-tier 211 institutions, with solid educational strength and brand recognition; no related public opinion incidents occurred for this university during the 2026 Gaokao cycle reputation file, overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity total ranking 99th (average), short video exposure moderate; no record of admission gaps, stable application psychological expectations; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, the strength of finance and economics disciplines ranks among the top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/finance/economics majors in 2024 was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', cooling down compared to 2021's 'recommended' (72.42), with public opinion showing a differentiated attitude towards finance and economics majors; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 365,880, a slight increase of 0.78% compared to 363,040 in 2025, with a small intensification of competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial application for Hebei candidates; the university recruits nationwide, with the proportion of Physics Category enrollment in Hebei Province about 2–3%, which is normal, with no obvious changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small expansion of 4.3% in the 2026 plan, the slight increase of 0.78% in the total number of Physics Category candidates, the differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors but the strong brand power of SUFE, and the increased attention due to the slight increase in candidate numbers and expansion, a small upward adjustment of 50 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 11989, with a range of 11489–12489.

- Accounting.

Tier 2 (Medium)

- Financial Management (Intelligent Direction)
- Statistics (Including Statistics Base Class, Economic Statistics, Data Science)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Law (Including Double Bachelor's Degree, Foreign-Related Rule of Law Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11489–12489, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors (Finance and Taxation, Financial Management, Statistics, Economics), with Tier 1 majors (Finance, Accounting) as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors (Computer Science, Information Management, Mathematics) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<11489), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
